action_set_definitions.name: get_system_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current S88 automation state and safety verification status for Reactor R-405.

action_set_definitions.name: get_personnel_on_duty
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the IDs of the operator and authorized supervisor currently on shift for 21 CFR Part 11 electronic signature compliance.

action_set_definitions.name: get_reactor_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Reads real-time sensor data from the reactor including temperature (K), product C concentration (mol/L), and valve statuses.

action_set_definitions.name: submit_dual_signature
action_set_definitions.description: Submits electronic signatures from both operator and supervisor to authorize a specific modification. Required for every hardware or state change.

action_description.description: Description of the task being authorized (e.g., 'Safety Verification', 'Adjust Coolant', 'Incremental Injection').

action_set_definitions.name: update_safety_prerequisites
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the safety verification flag. Hardware interaction is prohibited if false.

action_set_definitions.name: set_batch_state
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the S88 state logic for the Electronic Batch Record (EBR).

action_set_definitions.name: adjust_coolant_valve
action_set_definitions.description: Modifies the cooling valve opening percentage. Requires authorization token.

action_set_definitions.name: inject_auxiliary_reactant
action_set_definitions.description: Controls addition of auxiliary reactants. Max volume per injection is 0.5L.

state_description.reactor_temperature_k: Internal temperature of the reactor in Kelvin.
state_description.reactor_pressure_bar: Internal pressure of the reactor vessel in bars.
state_description.reactant_a_concentration: Concentration of Reactant A in mol/L.
state_description.reactant_b_concentration: Concentration of Reactant B in mol/L.
state_description.product_c_concentration: Concentration of the target Product C in mol/L.
state_description.stirrer_speed_rpm: Rotational speed of the internal stirrer in Revolutions Per Minute.
state_description.coolant_valve_opening: Percentage of the cooling jacket valve opening (0 to 100).
state_description.elapsed_time_seconds: Total time elapsed since the start of the batch process.
